items.title: Thiếu đất sét, làng gốm đỏ trăm tuổi ở Vĩnh Long nguy cơ ngừng lửa
items.summary: Cạn nguồn đất sét đặc trưng, nhiều cơ sở gốm đỏ ở Vĩnh Long phải thu hẹp hoặc ngừng sản xuất, không dám nhận đơn hàng mới, khiến khoảng 2.000 lao động bị ảnh hưởng.

items.title: Gavin Newsom says Trump ordered DOJ to investigate him and his wife
items.summary: California Gov. Newsom called President Donald Trump "simply the most corrupt President in American history."

items.title: Nvidia plans to raise at least $20 billion in first debt sale since start of AI boom
items.summary: Nvidia is set raise capital in a debt sale for the first time since 2021, when the chipmaker was a fraction of its current size.

items.title: The Iran deal came just in time as Strategic Petroleum Reserve hits lowest level since 1983
items.summary: Oil executives have warned that global inventories are rapidly depleting due to the supply disruption triggered by the Iran war.

items.title: How the Strait of Hormuz reopening could unfold if the U.S.-Iran deal is implemented
items.summary: Tanker traffic through Hormuz could quickly increase but it is unclear whether transits will approach prewar levels, according to Kpler.

items.title: Wall Street's fear gauge tumbles as traders bid up SpaceX shares
items.summary: The biggest IPO has been digested without a hiccup, and Wall Street's  so-called "fear gauge" is back below its long-term average.

items.title: Centene to offer buyouts to some employees as health insurer cuts costs
items.summary: The health insurer Centene did not indicate to how many employees were offered buyouts or how much it is aiming to reduce its workforce.

items.title: Kinh tế toàn cầu ra sao sau thỏa thuận hòa bình Mỹ - Iran?
items.summary: Thỏa thuận Mỹ - Iran mang lại lợi ích lớn cho nhiều nước châu Á, xoa dịu gánh nặng chi phí cho doanh nghiệp và các ngân hàng trung ương, theo giới phân tích.

items.title: The US government’s Anthropic models ban was never about an AI jailbreak
items.summary: The Trump administration's decision that forced Anthropic to pull its latest cybersecurity models could be reactionary, retaliatory, or both, but the message is clear: The AI industry isn't immune from U.S. government interference.

items.title: Meta’s new ‘AI Mode’ on Facebook pulls from public info across its platforms
items.summary: Meta announced Monday that it's rolling out a wave of new AI features on Facebook, the latest sign of the company's effort to catch up in the AI race and keep users more engaged on the platform.

items.title: SpaceX is public: Everything you need to know post-IPO
items.summary: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

items.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
items.summary: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.
